risks: ACR 'acrmltraineus001' uses Standard SKU with publicNetworkAccess set to Disabled; disabling public network access requires Premium SKU and will fail deployment.

No VNet or private endpoint resources are defined despite publicNetworkAccess being disabled on the ML workspace, ACR, and compute; network-isolated resources need private endpoints to remain accessible.
No customer-managed key (CMK) configuration for the ML workspace; Microsoft-managed keys are used by default, which may not meet stricter compliance requirements for encrypted outputs.
Log Analytics retention is set to 30 days, which may be insufficient for audit compliance in regulated environments.
No explicit diagnostic settings for the storage account or Key Vault; only the ML workspace has diagnostics configured.
correctionsRecommended: Upgrade ACR SKU from Standard to Premium to support publicNetworkAccess: Disabled and private endpoints.
Add VNet and private endpoint resources for the ML workspace, storage account, Key Vault, ACR, and Log Analytics workspace to enable the declared network isolation posture.
Add diagnostic settings resources for the storage account (stmltraineus001) and Key Vault (kv-mltrain-eus-001) to achieve full audit coverage.
Consider increasing Log Analytics retention beyond 30 days if audit compliance requires longer retention periods.
Consider adding a managed VNet isolation configuration to the ML workspace for simplified network security management.
Add RBAC role assignments for the ML workspace system-assigned managed identity to access storage, Key Vault, and ACR with least-privilege scopes.
hardDependencies: ACR Standard SKU is incompatible with publicNetworkAccess: Disabled — requires Premium SKU to deploy successfully.
